texto: There's no question winter here can take a chunk out of you. Not like the extreme cold of the upper Midwest or the round-the-clock darkness of Alaska might, but rather the opposite. Here, it's a general lack of severity - monotonous flat gray skies and the constant drip-drip of misty rain - that erodes the spirit.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dylan Tomine: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “There's no question winter here can take a chunk out of you. Not like the extreme cold of the upp…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, rain, weather pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e reflexao-noturna.
